issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing required parameters: 'count' (should specify looking at 5 cards), 'filter' conditions (must include: type=purple, cardType={Straw Hat Crew}), and 'maxReveal' (up to 1 card). Current filter is 'Any' which doesn't match the card text restrictions.
Missing action for placing remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. The effect only captures the search/reveal/add-to-hand portion but omits the deck reorganization step.
